revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24699703697|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
'''Enomiya Shrine''' is a shrine in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]]. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == {| class="wikitable sortable" ! District !! Name !! Funding category !! Rank !! Notes !! Same as !! Co-ords !! Shrine DB |- | — || {{ill|Enomiya Shrine|lt=Enomiya Shrine|ja|宅宮神社|qid=Q11448984|1=Enomiya Shrine}} || {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|lt=Kokuhei|comment=categorized|1=Kokuhei-sha}} || {{ill|Shikinai Shōsha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} || — || — || {{coord|34.037551|134.506921|display=inline}} || [https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=183205 DB] |} {{wikidata link|Q11448984}} == Accidentally Overwritten Content == {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Enomiya Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:宅宮神社.jpeg|300px]] |location = {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県|12=draft|12=draft}}{{ill|Tokushima (city)|ja|徳島市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Kamiyachiman Town, Kaminakasugi 558 |coordinates = {{Coord|34|02|15.3|N|134|30|24.9|E|region:JP-36_type:landmark_scale:25000|display=inline,title}} |deity = {{ill|Otomabe no Mikoto|ja|大苫辺尊|12=draft|12=draft}}
{{ill|Otoshi no Kami|ja|大歳神|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Wakatakehiko no Mikoto|ja|稚武彦命|12=draft|12=draft}} |consecration_year = Unknown |Main Shrine = {{ill|Shinmei-zukuri|ja|神明造|12=draft|12=draft}} |Festival = {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日|12=draft|12=draft}} |Rituals = {{ill|Shinto dance|ja|神踊り|12=draft|12=draft}} (August 15) }} '''Enomiya Shrine''' (宅宮神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Tokushima (city)|ja|徳島市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Kamiyachiman Town, Tokushima Prefecture, Japan. == History == The shrine's founding date is unknown. It is identified with the ''{{ill|Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft|12=draft}}'' entry for {{ill|Otoma Hime Shrine|ja|意富門麻比売神社|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Awa Province|ja|阿波国|12=draft|12=draft}}, Namikata District ({{ill|Shikinai Shrine|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=draft|12=draft}}). It is the only shrine enshrining {{ill|Otonoji and Otonobe|lt=Otomabe no Mikoto|ja|大苫辺尊|12=draft|12=draft}}, making it notable among the Namikata District's 12 shrines. In 874 ({{ill|Jōgan era|ja|貞観|12=draft|12=draft}} 16), it received the lower fifth Rank in the system of {{ill|Shinkai|ja|神階|1=Shinkai (divine Rank)|12=draft|12=draft}}. The main deity is regarded as the god of homes and construction. The shrine was designated a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|12=draft|12=draft}} under the old shrine Ranking system. == Deities == The shrine enshrines the following deities: * {{ill|Otonoji and Otonobe|lt=Otomabe no Mikoto|ja|大苫辺尊|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Toshigami|lt=Otoshi no Kami|ja|大歳神|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Wakatakehiko|lt=Wakatakehiko no Mikoto|ja|稚武彦命|12=draft|12=draft}} == Crest == * The shrine's crest is a circle with five-seven paulownia (''maru-ni-go-shichi-kiri''). == Rituals == * festival - {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日|12=draft|12=draft}} * Prayers for the Year - {{ill|Lunisolar February 1|ja|Lunisolar February1日|12=draft|12=draft}} * Summer Festival - {{ill|July 15|ja|7月15日|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Shinto Dance|ja|神踊り|12=draft|12=draft}} - {{ill|August 15|ja|8月15日|12=draft|12=draft}} : Designated as a Tokushima Prefecture Intangible Folk Cultural Property.[http://www.city.tokushima.tokushima.jp/shakai_kyoiku/gaiyo09.html "Protection and Use of Cultural Properties" (Tokushima City website, cultural property list)] This festival, originating in the late {{ill|Heian period|ja|平安時代|12=draft|12=draft}}, prays for agricultural prosperity and the prevention of epidemics. There are 12 traditional dance songs, each with simple lyrics. * New Grain Thanksgiving Festival - {{ill|December 23|ja|12月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} == Cultural Properties == * {{ill|Kamiyo moji|ja|神代文字|12=draft|12=draft}} woodblocks * {{ill|Hachisuka Mochiaki|ja|蜂須賀茂韶|12=draft|12=draft}}'s deity plaque == Access == * From {{ill|Tokushima Station|ja|徳島駅|12=draft|12=draft}} (JR), take the Tokushima City Bus to the "Kamiyachiman Elementary School" stop; the shrine is a short walk from there. == References == {{Reflist}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} == Accidentally Overwritten Content == {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Enomiya Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:宅宮神社.jpeg|300px]] |location = {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県|12=draft|12=draft}}{{ill|Tokushima (city)|ja|徳島市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Kamiyachiman Town, Kaminakasugi 558 |coordinates = {{Coord|34|02|15.3|N|134|30|24.9|E|region:JP-36_type:landmark_scale:25000|display=inline,title}} |deity = {{ill|Otomabe no Mikoto|ja|大苫辺尊|12=draft|12=draft}}
{{ill|Otoshi no Kami|ja|大歳神|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Wakatakehiko no Mikoto|ja|稚武彦命|12=draft|12=draft}} |consecration_year = Unknown |Main Shrine = {{ill|Shinmei-zukuri|ja|神明造|12=draft|12=draft}} |Festival = {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日|12=draft|12=draft}} |Rituals = {{ill|Shinto dance|ja|神踊り|12=draft|12=draft}} (August 15) }} '''Enomiya Shrine''' (宅宮神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Tokushima (city)|ja|徳島市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Kamiyachiman Town, Tokushima Prefecture, Japan. == History == The shrine's founding date is unknown. It is identified with the ''{{ill|Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft|12=draft}}'' entry for {{ill|Otoma Hime Shrine|ja|意富門麻比売神社|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Awa Province|ja|阿波国|12=draft|12=draft}}, Namikata District ({{ill|Shikinai Shrine|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=draft|12=draft}}). It is the only shrine enshrining {{ill|Otonoji and Otonobe|lt=Otomabe no Mikoto|ja|大苫辺尊|12=draft|12=draft}}, making it notable among the Namikata District's 12 shrines. In 874 ({{ill|Jōgan era|ja|貞観|12=draft|12=draft}} 16), it received the lower fifth Rank in the system of {{ill|Shinkai|ja|神階|1=Shinkai (divine Rank)|12=draft|12=draft}}. The main deity is regarded as the god of homes and construction. The shrine was designated a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|12=draft|12=draft}} under the old shrine Ranking system. == Deities == The shrine enshrines the following deities: * {{ill|Otonoji and Otonobe|lt=Otomabe no Mikoto|ja|大苫辺尊|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Toshigami|lt=Otoshi no Kami|ja|大歳神|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Wakatakehiko|lt=Wakatakehiko no Mikoto|ja|稚武彦命|12=draft|12=draft}} == Crest == * The shrine's crest is a circle with five-seven paulownia (''maru-ni-go-shichi-kiri''). == Rituals == * festival - {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日|12=draft|12=draft}} * Prayers for the Year - {{ill|Lunisolar February 1|ja|Lunisolar February1日|12=draft|12=draft}} * Summer Festival - {{ill|July 15|ja|7月15日|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Shinto Dance|ja|神踊り|12=draft|12=draft}} - {{ill|August 15|ja|8月15日|12=draft|12=draft}} : Designated as a Tokushima Prefecture Intangible Folk Cultural Property.[http://www.city.tokushima.tokushima.jp/shakai_kyoiku/gaiyo09.html "Protection and Use of Cultural Properties" (Tokushima City website, cultural property list)] This festival, originating in the late {{ill|Heian period|ja|平安時代|12=draft|12=draft}}, prays for agricultural prosperity and the prevention of epidemics. There are 12 traditional dance songs, each with simple lyrics. * New Grain Thanksgiving Festival - {{ill|December 23|ja|12月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} == Cultural Properties == * {{ill|Kamiyo moji|ja|神代文字|12=draft|12=draft}} woodblocks * {{ill|Hachisuka Mochiaki|ja|蜂須賀茂韶|12=draft|12=draft}}'s deity plaque == Access == * From {{ill|Tokushima Station|ja|徳島駅|12=draft|12=draft}} (JR), take the Tokushima City Bus to the "Kamiyachiman Elementary School" stop; the shrine is a short walk from there. == References == {{Reflist}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} == Accidentally Overwritten Content == {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Enomiya Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:宅宮神社.jpeg|300px]] |location = {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県|12=draft|12=draft}}{{ill|Tokushima (city)|ja|徳島市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Kamiyachiman Town, Kaminakasugi 558 |coordinates = {{Coord|34|02|15.3|N|134|30|24.9|E|region:JP-36_type:landmark_scale:25000|display=inline,title}} |deity = {{ill|Otomabe no Mikoto|ja|大苫辺尊|12=draft|12=draft}}
{{ill|Otoshi no Kami|ja|大歳神|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Wakatakehiko no Mikoto|ja|稚武彦命|12=draft|12=draft}} |consecration_year = Unknown |Main Shrine = {{ill|Shinmei-zukuri|ja|神明造|12=draft|12=draft}} |Festival = {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日|12=draft|12=draft}} |Rituals = {{ill|Shinto dance|ja|神踊り|12=draft|12=draft}} (August 15) }} '''Enomiya Shrine''' (宅宮神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Tokushima (city)|ja|徳島市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Kamiyachiman Town, Tokushima Prefecture, Japan. == History == The shrine's founding date is unknown. It is identified with the ''{{ill|Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft|12=draft}}'' entry for {{ill|Otoma Hime Shrine|ja|意富門麻比売神社|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Awa Province|ja|阿波国|12=draft|12=draft}}, Namikata District ({{ill|Shikinai Shrine|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=draft|12=draft}}). It is the only shrine enshrining {{ill|Otonoji and Otonobe|lt=Otomabe no Mikoto|ja|大苫辺尊|12=draft|12=draft}}, making it notable among the Namikata District's 12 shrines. In 874 ({{ill|Jōgan era|ja|貞観|12=draft|12=draft}} 16), it received the lower fifth Rank in the system of {{ill|Shinkai|ja|神階|1=Shinkai (divine Rank)|12=draft|12=draft}}. The main deity is regarded as the god of homes and construction. The shrine was designated a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|12=draft|12=draft}} under the old shrine Ranking system. == Deities == The shrine enshrines the following deities: * {{ill|Otonoji and Otonobe|lt=Otomabe no Mikoto|ja|大苫辺尊|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Toshigami|lt=Otoshi no Kami|ja|大歳神|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Wakatakehiko|lt=Wakatakehiko no Mikoto|ja|稚武彦命|12=draft|12=draft}} == Crest == * The shrine's crest is a circle with five-seven paulownia (''maru-ni-go-shichi-kiri''). == Rituals == * festival - {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日|12=draft|12=draft}} * Prayers for the Year - {{ill|Lunisolar February 1|ja|Lunisolar February1日|12=draft|12=draft}} * Summer Festival - {{ill|July 15|ja|7月15日|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Shinto Dance|ja|神踊り|12=draft|12=draft}} - {{ill|August 15|ja|8月15日|12=draft|12=draft}} : Designated as a Tokushima Prefecture Intangible Folk Cultural Property.[http://www.city.tokushima.tokushima.jp/shakai_kyoiku/gaiyo09.html "Protection and Use of Cultural Properties" (Tokushima City website, cultural property list)] This festival, originating in the late {{ill|Heian period|ja|平安時代|12=draft|12=draft}}, prays for agricultural prosperity and the prevention of epidemics. There are 12 traditional dance songs, each with simple lyrics. * New Grain Thanksgiving Festival - {{ill|December 23|ja|12月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} == Cultural Properties == * {{ill|Kamiyo moji|ja|神代文字|12=draft|12=draft}} woodblocks * {{ill|Hachisuka Mochiaki|ja|蜂須賀茂韶|12=draft|12=draft}}'s deity plaque == Access == * From {{ill|Tokushima Station|ja|徳島駅|12=draft|12=draft}} (JR), take the Tokushima City Bus to the "Kamiyachiman Elementary School" stop; the shrine is a short walk from there. == References == {{Reflist}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} {{Expand Japanese|宅宮神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Takumiya Shrine | native_name = 宅宮神社 | image = 宅宮神社.jpeg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Takumiya Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.037551|134.506921}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Enomiya Shrine'''|宅宮神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}} * {{ill|Q135026601|ltq=Q135026601|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11657514|ltq=Q11657514|qid=Q11657514|1=List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)}} ** Series ordinal: 31 ** P155: {{ill|Takeminatomi Shrine|lt=Takeminatomi Shrine|ja|多祁御奈刀弥神社|qid=Q48759404|1=Take Minato Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q11400187|ltq=Q11400187|qid=Q11400187|1=Katsura Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q207309|ltq=Q207309|qid=Q207309|1=Tokushima (city)}} * {{ill|Awa Province (Tokushima)|lt=Awa Province|be|Ава (правінцыя, Сікоку)|cs|Provincie Awa (Tokušima)|de|Provinz Awa (Tokushima)|en|Awa Province (Tokushima)|es|Provincia de Awa (Tokushima)|fa|ولایت آوا|fr|Province d'Awa (Tokushima)|gl|Provincia de Awa, Tokushima|id|Provinsi Awa (Tokushima)|it|Awa (provincia, Tokushima)|ja|阿波国|ko|아와국 (난카이도)|lt|Avos žemė (Tokušima)|nl|Awa (Tokushima)|pt|Província de Awa (Tokushima)|ru|Ава (Сикоку)|simple|Awa Province (Tokushima)|sk|Awa (provincia, Tokušima)|sr|Провинција Ава (Шикоку)|tr|Awa (vilayet, Tokushima)|uk|Провінція Ава (Шікоку)|zh_min_nan|Awa-kok (Nankaidô)|zh|阿波國|qid=Q907457|1=Awa Province (Tokushima)}} * {{ill|Q3205778|ltq=Q3205778|qid=Q3205778|1=Nakata district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.037551|134.506921}} == image (P18) == * 宅宮神社.jpeg == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 183205 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917316|ltq=Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Shinto Directive|lt=Shinto Directive|en|Shinto Directive|fa|بخشنامه شینتو|fr|Directive shinto|id|Pengarahan Shinto|ja|神道指令|zh|神道指令|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == P14005 (P14005) == * database == architectural style (P149) == * {{ill|Q930545|ltq=Q930545|qid=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} == country (P17) == * ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * えのみやじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 9480005001466 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県徳島市上八万町上中筋558', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:宅宮神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11448984}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine |Name = Enomiya Shrine |Image = [[File:Enomiya Shrine.jpeg|270px]] |Location = {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Tokushima City|Q207309|qid=Q207309|1=Tokushima (city)}} 558 Kaminakasuji, Kamihachiman-chō |Coordinates = {{Wiki coordinates 2-tier degrees minutes seconds|34|02|15.3|N|134|30|24.9|E|region:JP-36_type:landmark_scale:25000|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deity = Ōtomabe no Mikoto
Ōtoshi-no-Kami / Toshigami · Wakemuhiko no Mikoto |Shrine rank = {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha (minor shrine)|Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
Former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |Founded = Unknown |Main hall = {{ill|lt=Shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|qid=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} |Alternate name = |Pilgrimage designation = |Annual festival = {{ill|lt=November 3|Q2995|qid=Q2995|1=November 3}} |Rituals = Sacred dance ({{ill|lt=August 15|Q2774|qid=Q2774|1=August 15}}) |Map = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Enomiya Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Enomiya Shrine''' (えのみやじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima City|Q207309|qid=Q207309|1=Tokushima (city)}}, {{ill|lt=Kamihachiman-chō|Q11358489|qid=Q11358489|1=Kamihachiman-chō}}. === History === The year of establishment is unknown. It is identified with “'''Ōtomahime Shrine''' (おおとまひめじんじゃ)” listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} for {{ill|lt=Awa Province|Q907457|qid=Q907457|1=Awa Province (Tokushima)}}, {{ill|lt=Myōgata District|Q3205778|qid=Q3205778|1=Nakata district}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}). It is the only shrine among the Shikinaisha that enshrines Ōtomabe no Mikoto. It was ranked first among the twelve shrines of Myōgata District and is a distinguished shrine. In {{ill|lt=874|Q23843|qid=Q23843|1=874}} (the 16th year of {{ill|lt=Jōgan (Japanese era)|Q1075635|qid=Q1075635|lt=Jōgan|1=Jōgan}}), it was granted the court rank of Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade ({{ill|lt=Shinkai|Q11591025|qid=Q11591025|1=Shinkai (divine rank)}}). The principal deity is said to be a god of households and construction. It was formerly a Gōsha (village shrine). === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtomabe no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} * {{ill|lt=Ōtoshi-no-Kami|UNKNOWN|lt=Toshigami}} * {{ill|lt=Wakemuhiko no Mikoto|Q11596350|qid=Q11596350|1=Wakatakehiko}} === Shrine crest === * Paulownia crest with five-seven arrangement inside a circle === Festivals and rituals === * Annual festival – {{ill|lt=November 3|Q2995|qid=Q2995|1=November 3}} * Kinen-sai (prayer for a good harvest) – {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Lunar calendar February 1|1=UNKNOWN}} * Summer festival – {{ill|lt=July 15|Q2686|qid=Q2686|1=July 15}} * Sacred dance – {{ill|lt=August 15|Q2774|qid=Q2774|1=August 15}} :Designated Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Tokushima Prefecture[http://www.city.tokushima.tokushima.jp/shakai_kyoiku/gaiyo09.html “Protection and Utilization of Cultural Properties” (Tokushima City website, with links to a list of cultural properties located in the city)]. Said to have begun in the late {{ill|lt=Heian period|Q193292|qid=Q193292|1=Heian period}}, this festival is held to pray for “bountiful harvests and the prevention of epidemics.” There are twelve types of dance songs, all with simple lyrics. * New Harvest Thanksgiving Festival – {{ill|lt=December 23|Q2676|qid=Q2676|1=December 23}} === Cultural properties === * Woodblocks of {{ill|lt=Jindai moji|Q1141193|qid=Q1141193|1=Jindai moji}} * Shrine name plaque of Lord {{ill|lt=Hachisuka Shigeaki|Q656008|qid=Q656008|1=Hachisuka Mochiaki}} === Access === * From {{ill|lt=Shikoku Railway Company|Q496531|qid=Q496531|lt=JR|1=Shikoku Railway Company}} {{ill|lt=Tokushima Station|Q860775|qid=Q860775|1=Tokushima Station}}, take the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Tokushima City Bus|1=UNKNOWN}} and get off at “{{ill|lt=Tokushima Municipal Kamihachiman Elementary School|UNKNOWN|lt=Kamihachiman Elementary School}}” stop; the shrine is immediately nearby. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto navigation}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Enomiya Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Enomiya Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima, Tokushima]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Tokushima Prefecture]] ==Notes== [[ja:宅宮神社]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Pages with duplicated content]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:Shrines in Tokushima]] [[Category:Enomiya Shrine]] [[Category:Junior Fifth Rank]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]]
